hotel_name: Khách Sạn Mường Thanh Cửa Đông (Muong Thanh Cua Dong Hotel)

reviews.title: The "massage spa" place on level 4 is basically a joint to go get a hand job. Its awful
reviews.text: Stayed here with my bf for one night, went to go get massages on the 4th floor and they offered him a hand job despite having signs around in English stating no sexual activity. We paid for one hour massages. Both were over within 35 min. The lady doing  my massage had clearly never given a normal proper massage to anyone ever before. Absolutely disgusting.
reviews.response:
Thank you for writing us a review! Firstly, we would like to apologize for the delay value the opinion of our customers, and we would love to hear your opinion how can we improve. We are so really apologize for our mistake. We promise if won’t happen again. Now, if you come back here again,  we believe that you will be satisfied with our services.
Thank you once agains, for your feedback!

reviews.title: Terrible
reviews.text: Customer service was nonexistent and would not stay there again. AC didn't work in the room, barely slept, and had to get a fan at 3am to sleep.. Finally got back to sleep around 6 and missed breakfast (6-9) by 10 min and was not able to be served. A little pissed because the reason I wasn't up earlier was because I couldn't sleep with the broken AC.. All in all a terrible experience and wouldn't recommend the hotel for others
reviews.response:
Thank you for spending time to leave us your comments. Aiming to improve quality time by time, we are very much appreciated your opinion and also felt sorry that you did not enjoy your stay.
We do hope to welcome you back with many better changes that are our commitment of being enthusiasm to clients' feeling.
Sincerely yours,

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: The extra charge on early check-in.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Dirty bed, bad staffs in the restaurant
reviews.response:
Lời đầu tiên, thay mặt Khách sạn cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn và sử dụng dịch của Khách sạn.

Về những thiếu sót mà Khách sạn chúng tôi đang mắc phải, chúng tôi hứa sẽ khắc phục và hoàn thiện hơn nữa dịch vụ hiện có của Khách sạn.
Mong Quý khách thông cảm và tiếp tục ủng hộ Khách sạn trong thời gian tiếp theo.

Xin chân thành cảm ơn!
Giám đốc – Nguyễn Việt Hùng

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: Nous avons fait un massage qui manquait terriblement de professionnalisme. mon mari s’est retrouvé avec des bleus dans le dos. l’hôtel est vieillissant mais ok. cher pour son état.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Nice clean room, good beds. However we were woken up by construction work in the hotel at 7am (which we hadn't been warned about) and smoking is allowed in the restaurant which I personally didn't appreciate when eating my breakfast. None of the staff spoke any english and when we left they made us pay for at towel that we had used to whipe off some dirt on our jeans because "it was too dirty to clean". That to me seemed ridiculous -first of all since they could have easily washed it off and second being a somewhat "fancy" hotel that was already quite expensive.

reviews.title: Stayed 3 Boring Nights at this hotel
reviews.text: Location was not very good. Very limited choice of restaurant - only one for all meals. Staff attitude not really polite and caring. We can't even charge the arranged transportation through hotel via credit card. Have to pay cash. Will NOT stay at this hotel again.
reviews.response:

Par contre la connexion wifi n'a pas arrêté de s'arrêter et de reprendre.

reviews.title: A little bit more effort and it could be actually comfortable
reviews.text:
Ok, the rooms were nice and clean, but sometimes this just isn’t enough...

I’m sorry, but I gotta really do not like to write bad reviews, but  I honestly think that this hotel does not deserve 3 stars, maybe in China. The coffee was probably the worst I ever had and the breakfast was not really anything special either.

The staff acted nice, but it was only fake.

I have been traveling with a bicycle for over a year now and this was the second time that I couldn’t take my bicycle in the room (first time was in Monaco) but “nicer” hotels usually have some attitude towards cyclists and they probably can not imagine that a bicycle can cost more than 5000$. 

I was in Vinh before, back in 2001 and not much has changed. Vietnam is going through a big change and tourism is a major factor for the economy, but Vinh still feels not much different than 18 years ago. People don’t speak English and spit on the ground...
reviews.response:
Thank you for spending time to leave us your comments. Aiming to improve quality time by time, we are very much appreciated your opinion and also felt sorry that you did not enjoy your stay.

Lo staff comunica abilmente e capiscono le esigenze dei clienti.
reviews.negatives: La colazione e' stato il punto carente, scarsa scelta e quella esistente lasciava a desiderare.

reviews.title: Nightmare!
reviews.text: I’ve been here . I DO NOT RECOMMEND THIS HOTEL! Since they turn off the air conditioner whole day even at night and they gave punch of reason to explain for you. I stayed here for 3 nights and the last night they turn on for me. Dang me and my mom was couldn’t sleep bc so so so hot

reviews.title: ヴィンの初滞在が快適で良い思い出になりました
reviews.positives:
立地も分かりやすく、周りに高い建物がないため見つけやすかったです。スーパーマーケットも徒歩すぐのところにあり、ロビーはhighlands coffeeが併設されているので、チェックアウト後に時間を潰すのにも困りませんでした。
フロントスタッフもとても感じがよく柔軟に対応してくれました。
reviews.negatives: 贅沢いえば朝食の種類がもう少しほしかったですが、お腹は十分満たされました。

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: A security guy named Võ Thuyên was having a very bad attitude with guests because he was running out of parking slot. I dont know why a 4 star hotel cannot offer car parking for guests who stay in and why they cannot train their staff better on how to give a good customer service up to their level as a 4 star hotel. Their staffs are like 2 star motel's staffs. Unacceptable!!!
reviews.response:
Dear Mr/Mrs,

We would like to thank you for your comments, We feel really sorry for your bad feeling, Trying to achieve the highest satisfaction from our guests is the priority target for all hotel 's employees. 
For the security man's attitude, We know that it has not been perfect yet, but we will try the most as we can and train staff better.
Once again thank you for your contribution and hope to see you next time.

Best regards!

reviews.title: nice enough hotel but a bit far from anything
reviews.text: Clean and comfortable. Good staff with English spoken. Would not recommend simply because you need to take a taxi to go anywhere. There are no restaurants nearby and the one in the hotel is buffet only. I had the breakfast and the only western item they had was toast! Not even eggs. Granted I can see why as I was the only western person there I saw during a 2 day stay. If you have your own transportation it is good value.

I hope they need to know we pay for stay and don't talk after customers because they are pay for your salary . Thank you
